_note: F-1 reference fixture. Validates pipeline behavior on an FDA voluntary recall notice involving undeclared pharmaceutical ingredients.
submitter_note: FDA voluntary recall — undeclared sildenafil and tadalafil in consumer honey products
case_description: FDA voluntary recall by Pure Vitamins involving honey-style male enhancement products containing undeclared prescription drug ingredients (sildenafil, tadalafil). Products pose a health risk due to dangerous blood pressure interactions with nitrates. Expected to produce High severity with escalation — the health risk and consumer impact justify escalation to a compliance or consumer safety team.
